sales.description:
NICEPHORUS II, 963-969. AV Histamenon Nomisma (4.42 gms), Constantinople Mint, 967-969. NGC MS, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 3/5. Ex Jewelry.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1778. Obverse: Facing bust of Christ Pantokrator; Reverse: Facing busts of the Theotokos (Virgin Mary) and Nicephorus, holding between them a patriarchal cross. Despite prior use in jewelry, and impressive example, with full bold details, and a powerful strike.

From the Peter Jones M.D. Coll...

sales.description:
NICEPHORUS III, 1078-1081. El Histamenon Nomisma (4.38 gms), Constantinople Mint. NGC AU, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 4/5. Brushed.
To view all items from the Peter Jones M.D. Collection, click  here.
S-1881. Obverse: Christ Pantokrator seated facing on backless throne; Reverse: Nicephorus standing facing, holding globus cruciger and labarum with X on shaft and pellet at base.

From the Peter Jones M.D. Collection. 

Ex: Jean Elsen 135 (12/2017) Lot # 608.

Estimate: 500 - 750...
